titleStmt.title: SII 23.385: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 385. (A.R. No. 385 of 1907.) Māyūram, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Pañchanadēśvara temple—on the south wall of the same maṇḍapa Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year 19: 1195-96 A.D.

summary.p: This also begins with the same expressions. It is dated in the 297th day of the year. This seems to register a sale of some land at Kulōttuṅgaśōḻanallūr made tax-free by order of the king to the temple, issued through the Tirumandira-ōlai Rājanārāyaṇa-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccak] karavattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamuṅ koṇṭu pāṇṭi
yaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yā
ṇṭu 10 9 ḷe9 10 7- ṉāl Iṭṭa niṉaippiṉpaṭi kārāṇai viḻupparaiyarvi
[jivi]tamākappeṟṟa [jaya]ṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Akkaḷūrpā
k kattār kuṭiiruppu kulottuṅkacoḻanallūr nilam 10 4
parikarattār kuṭi Iruppu kulottuṅkacoḻap peru
yāka veliyāṟkācu vanta kācukku viṟkavum Iṉnilattukku puravarikkūṟu
ceyvārkaḷum puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam pālaiyūr kiḻavaṉum tiru mantira Olai Irā[ja]
nārāyaṇamuventa veḷāṉum Eḻuttu Iṭṭa piramāṇaṅ kuṭukkavum [ Ipra] māṇa vi
laippaṭi kācu kacciyarāyar A paṉaitaṇṭalile Oṭukkavum tiruvāy moḻin
taruḷiṉamaiyil keyamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭup paṭṭiṉakkūṟṟat
tuk kuṟṟālamuṭaiyāṉ I tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ kārāṇai
viḻupparaiyarkku koṇ
ṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭut tiruva nāṭṭu Akkaḷūrppākkattārkkuṭiyiruppu
māṟiṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa nilam10vi4�kku veliyāṟ 6 100 2 10 Āka 6�e2ivi4
kkum I nilam pavi4ma- m kulottuṅkacoḻap peruvilai viṟṟuk kuṭutta maikku puravuvari
śrīkaraṇanāyakam pālaiyū Eḻuttu Ivai Irācanārāyaṇamuventa veḷāṉ
ṉeḻuttu Ivai ci raiya ṉeḻuttu Ivai kacci
yarāya ṉeḻuttu Ivai vaṉṉākuṭaiyā ṉeḻu
ttu Ivai cerako ṉeḻuttu Ippiramāṇatti
l meṟpaṭṭa nilam 10 kuṟṟālattu Uṭaiyār tiruvai
yāṟuṭaiyārkkut ti maikku Ivai kārāṇai
Eḻuttu nāṭṭu paṭṭiṉakkūṟṟattuk kuṟ
ṟālamuṭai
tuṅkacoḻa vilaikoṇṭa jayaṅ
ṭṭu Akkaḷū kirakattārkkuṭi Iruppu māṟiṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa nallūrkku
vilaippa kacciyarāyar Aṭaippāṉa peruntaṉattu māḷikait taṇṭalil Oṭukkiṉa
kācukku ttuḷ Ūrmāviṉāl Oṭukkiṉa kācu 2 100 2ivi4kkum Ivai puravari śrīkaraṇanāyakam
pālaiyūr ttu Ivai Irājanārāyaṇa muventaveḷā ṉeḻuttu Ivai kacciyarāya
ṉeḻuttu Ivai vaṉṉāṭuṭaiyā ṉeḻuttu Ivai veṇāṭṭaraiya ṉeḻuttu Ivai cerakoṉeḻu
ttu Ivai vicaiyarāya ṉeḻuttu Ivai nuḷampātirāca ṉeḻuttu Ivai kaṉakarāja ṉeḻuttu
Ivai cimpeṟṟaraiya ṉeḻuttu Ivai paḻantiyarāya ṉeḻuttu Ivai vāṇādhirāca ṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.385 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
